name: International Flavors & Fragrances Inc.
description: International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. is a global leader in bioscience, ingredients, and specialty solutions. The company operates through four main segments: Nourish, Scent, Health & Biosciences, and Pharma Solutions. It co-creates essential solutions for a wide range of products, including food and beverages, fragrances, personal care, household goods, and pharmaceuticals. Headquartered in New York, IFF serves customers worldwide, leveraging its extensive research and development capabilities to deliver innovative and sustainable taste, scent, and nutrition experiences.
